exercises.title: Basic Practice
exercises.description: Type these words: the quick brown fox jumps over lazy dog

solution.code: the quick brown fox jumps over lazy dog

exercises.title: Sentence Practice
exercises.description: Type each sentence without looking at the keyboard.

solution.code:
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs.
How vexingly quick daft zebras jump!
